name: df-voice-app
description: Universal web and native voice workbench for local and OpenAI-compatible services.

scripts.verify:static: npm run typecheck && npm run verify:logic && npx expo-doctor && python -m py_compile scripts/*.py
scripts.verify:web:server: python scripts/with-servers.py --server "BROWSER=none npx expo start --web --port 8081 --host localhost" --port 8081 --timeout 120 -- python scripts/verify-web.py
scripts.verify:web-build: npm run build:web && python scripts/with-servers.py --server "python -m http.server 8082 --directory dist" --port 8082 --timeout 30 -- env CLIENT_URL=http://localhost:8082 python scripts/verify-web.py
scripts.verify:mock:server: python scripts/with-servers.py --server "BROWSER=none npx expo start --web --port 8081 --host localhost" --port 8081 --server "python scripts/mock-openai-compatible.py --port 8099" --port 8099 --timeout 120 -- sh -c "python scripts/verify-asr-mock.py && python scripts/verify-openai-mock.py"
scripts.verify:ci: npm run verify:static && npm run verify:web:server && npm run verify:web-build && npm run verify:mock:server && npm run verify:android-config
